title: sebestena brachycalyx
intro: Sebestena brachycalyx is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae, native to Mexico and Central America, known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Sebestena brachycalyx is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Sebestena brachycalyx include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
